name: sales
description: B2B outbound sales plugin: 6 specialist agents produce a research-grounded cold-outbound playbook — ICP, prospect lists, scripts, multi-touch cadences, CRM setup, and a recording-driven coaching loop. Includes a role-play mode where Claude plays a skeptical prospect and scores adherence to a chosen framework. Built for solo founders and small teams running B2B outbound at volume. Output lives in .sales/ in the target project and feeds back into marketing attribution.
